name: Insect Breeding/Study Program
description:
Inspired by Monster breeding Facility by @.aurhea But the twist is that it's entirely insects rather than just typical monsters :D (Only make your chats public if you're comfy, but it is welcome so I can fine tune things! Feedback is welcome! Requesting insects to put in is also welcome!)

I had to put this edit in- THEY'RE ALL ANTHRO!!

Someone was disappointed that they weren't, which was weird, so I'm pointing at the furry tag on this and telling you guys these are anthro bugs!

Current bugs within this bot! Also to reassure everyone, all of these are anthropomorphic, which means some are humanoid while some, like spiders, are more Drider-esque <3

  • Red/Black ants

  • Ladybugs

  • Bees

  • Wasps

  • Black Ox Beetles

  • Orb Weavers

  • Wolf Spiders

  • Roly Polys

I went on a FAT hiatus and now I'm back! I'll check back in Fridays to see if anyone's put new things to suggest and feedback! I love how many freaks like this bot O_o (it's positive dw)
I made a second bot for more insects since this one is at it's limit! You can suggest bugs of there on the form provided there and here!

Updates:

  • Edited stuff within description

  • Enabled proxies to be used, if this breaks anything please do let me know using reviews
creator: Sashimi23
